items.name: Cloud Carbon Footprint
items.description: An open source tool that provides visibility and tooling to measure, monitor, and reduce your cloud carbon emissions.

items.name: Azure Emission Impact Dashboard
items.description: Power BI App that provides emissions for azure cloud resource usage.

items.name: Azure Cloud for Sustainability API
items.description: Microsoft Cloud for Sustainability provides APIs to access emissions data related to your Azure and Microsoft 365 usage.

items.name: Google Carbon Footprint
items.description: The Carbon Footprint dashboard displays estimated greenhouse gas emissions associated with the usage of covered Google Cloud services for the selected billing account.

items.name: AWS Customer Carbon Footprint Tool
items.description: The AWS Customer Carbon Footprint Tool provides estimates of the carbon emissions associated with AWS products and services. Data is updated with a delay of three months.

items.name: Li10 for AWS
items.description: Measures the emissions for AWS resources with Software Carbon Intensity methodology defined by the Green Software Foundation.

items.name: Boavizta Cloud-Scanner for AWS
items.description: Boavizta Cloud-Scanner calculates environmental impacts of your cloud compute and storage instances. It combines real time inventory and usage data from your cloud account with Boavizta API to offer a view of your impacts on a given region.

items.name: Green Cost Explorer for AWS
items.description: The Green Cost Explorer is a tool by The Green Web Foundation that helps visualize AWS cloud spending alongside carbon emissions data to support more sustainable cloud infrastructure decisions.

items.name: Scaleway Environment Footprint Calculator
items.description: Scaleway's Environmental footprint calculator allows you to measure your environmental impact to your use of Scaleway cloud and bare metal services.

items.name: Tailpipe
items.description: Tailpipe is a proprietary service that estimates your organization's carbon emissions from cloud computing. It uses billing and usage data from your cloud service provider (CSP), combines it with other data from the CSP and other third parties (like Boavizta). It also provides recommendations for cost-effective carbon reduction methods.

items.name: Cloud Assess
items.description: Cloud Assess is an open-source tool to automate the assessment of the environmental impacts of cloud services.

items.name: Kepler
items.description: Kepler (Kubernetes-based Efficient Power Level Exporter) uses eBPF to probe performance counters and other system stats, use ML models to estimate workload energy consumption based on these stats, and exports them as Prometheus metrics.

items.name: KEIT
items.description: KEIT (Kubernetes Emissions Insights Tool) supplements the energy recording with Kepler with current grid carbon intensity values and embodied carbon emissions.

items.name: aether
items.description: A open telemetry exporter to calculate the carbon emissions generated by your cloud infrastructure.

items.name: OpenTelemetry Java Agent Extension (RETIT)
items.description: An extension for the OpenTelemetry Java Agent that collects resource demand data and publishes carbon emissions.

items.name: Dynatrace Carbon Impact
items.description: A proprietary solution that provides insights into the carbon footprint of cloud applications and infrastructure, helping organizations reduce their environmental impact.

items.name: InfluxData Telegraf
items.description: A plugin-driven server agent for collecting and reporting metrics, including energy consumption and carbon emissions.

items.name: Greenpixie GPX Data
items.description: A solution for optimizing cloud infrastructure to reduce carbon emissions.

items.name: txture
items.description: A platform for analyzing and optimizing cloud infrastructure for cost and sustainability.

items.name: OxygenIT
items.description: A solution for optimizing IT infrastructure to reduce energy consumption and carbon emissions.

items.name: EcoInfra
items.description: ecoinfra is a powerful tool that helps you predict, assess, and reduce the environmental impact of your cloud infrastructure. By integrating your existing or new IaC project you can harness predictive sustainability into your cloud operations.
